justification: The diff updates Spring Boot to 3.3.13 and Java to 21, removes deprecated junit-vintage-engine, and uses Path.of() and text blocks, which are good. However, the text block in MoviesRepository.java incorrectly escapes whitespace with \s instead of using actual spaces, which will break the SQL query. Also, the MavenWrapperDownloader.java changes are just import cleanups, not Java 21 idioms.
